title: Weekly Gaussian Splatting digest — W19
stumbles: wiki_page on guessed Synthesis node id 'Synthesis:weekly-2026-w18' returned 'not found'; recovered by searching the syntheses kind to find the correct id 'Synthesis:weekly-2026-W18'.
summary: Compiled W19 digest by searching the corpus for recent Gaussian Splatting papers, reading four paper bodies (Revising Densification, MVSplat, latentSplat, 2DGS) and pulling MVSplat neighbours via node_context. Drafted a ~500-word synthesis anchored to six papers. Surfaced 'multi-view consistency under fast motion' as the recurring open question that feed-forward GS does not escape.
